subject: fantasy_stone_wood
kind_description: a decorative HUD panel frame suitable for 9-slice stretching

style_variant: fantasy RPG UI with carved wood and hammered metal textures
style_modifiers: warm brown-and-gold palette, subtle wear and weathering, no gradient noise
expected: 512x512 fantasy panel frame, suitable for 9-slice — clearly defined corners + edges + hollow interior; clean chromakey

subject: scifi_rounded

state_description: at rest in the default idle state, subtle normal lighting, steady cyan accent line
style_variant: sci-fi cyberpunk UI with neon edges and dark panels
style_modifiers: cool cyan-and-black palette, slight rim glow, flat matte fill
expected: cyberpunk rounded button in idle state, cyan accent; clean chromakey; ready for text overlay

subject: minimalist_hp
kind_description: a horizontal health bar with an empty container and a partially-full fill region

style_variant: minimalist flat design with crisp geometric shapes
style_modifiers: high-contrast black container with bright red fill, clean edges, no gradient noise
expected: horizontal health bar at 75% fill, minimalist aesthetic, clean chromakey — useful as base asset; engine overlays numeric text
